mapper.sql: CASE WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_exiting, 0) = 1 THEN '3' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_expiring30, 0) = 1 THEN '5' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_expiring90, 0) = 1 THEN '4' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_active, 0) = 1 THEN '7' WHEN IFNULL(contract_room_status.has_expired, 0) = 1 THEN '6' ELSE r.status END

r.id, r.park_id, p.name AS park_name, r.building_id, b.name AS building_name, r.name, r.floor, r.area, r.rent_price, r.property_fee, r.house_type, r.orientation, r.address, r.facilities, r.highlights, r.scene_images, r.floor_plan_images, r.status AS base_status, AS status, r.vacant_since, r.sync_status, r.sync_time, r.memo, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time

LEFT JOIN ( SELECT room_id, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status IN ('6', '7', '8') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_exiting, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status = '2' OR (contract_status = '1' AND end_date < CURDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_expired, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status = '1' AND end_date >= CURDATE() AND end_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_expiring30, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status = '1' AND end_date > DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 30 DAY) AND end_date <= DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_expiring90, MAX(CASE WHEN contract_status = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_active FROM ( SELECT c.room_id AS room_id, c.contract_status, c.end_date FROM biz_contract c WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND c.room_id IS NOT NULL UNION ALL SELECT CAST(REPLACE(TRIM(SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(c.room_ids, ',', numbers.n), ',', -1)), 'room_', '') AS UNSIGNED) AS room_id, c.contract_status, c.end_date FROM biz_contract c INNER JOIN ( SELECT 1 AS n UNION ALL SELECT 2 UNION ALL SELECT 3 UNION ALL SELECT 4 UNION ALL SELECT 5 UNION ALL SELECT 6 UNION ALL SELECT 7 UNION ALL SELECT 8 UNION ALL SELECT 9 UNION ALL SELECT 10 ) numbers ON numbers.n <= 1 + LENGTH(COALESCE(c.room_ids, '')) - LENGTH(REPLACE(COALESCE(c.room_ids, ''), ',', '')) WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND c.room_ids IS NOT NULL AND c.room_ids != '' ) contract_room WHERE room_id IS NOT NULL AND room_id > 0 GROUP BY room_id ) contract_room_status ON contract_room_status.room_id = r.id
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM ics_room r LEFT JOIN ics_building b ON b.id = r.building_id LEFT JOIN ics_park p ON p.id = r.park_id
ORDER BY r.id DESC

SELECT
FROM ics_room r LEFT JOIN ics_building b ON b.id = r.building_id LEFT JOIN ics_park p ON p.id = r.park_id
ORDER BY r.id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE ics_room SET status = #{status}, vacant_since = CASE WHEN #{status} != '0' THEN NULL WHEN #{resetVacantSince} = TRUE THEN NOW() WHEN status = '0' THEN COALESCE(vacant_since, NOW()) ELSE NOW() END, sync_status = '0', update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE ics_room SET sync_status = '1', sync_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = DATABASE() AND table_name = #{tableName}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_contract c WHERE c.del_flag = '0' AND ( c.room_id = #{roomId} OR FIND_IN_SET(#{roomId}, REPLACE(COALESCE(c.room_ids, ''), 'room_', '')) )
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_service_workorder w WHERE FIND_IN_SET(#{roomId}, REPLACE(COALESCE(w.room_ids, ''), 'room_', ''))
